changelog: Fixed Reset to Default not working at all in the SSH addon's normal, correctly-locked-down steady state (boot: manual, stopped) -- the reset watcher only runs while that addon is up, so a real click had nothing running to process it, and by the time anyone noticed and started the addon, the trigger looked stale and got silently discarded. The button now explicitly starts the SSH addon itself before touching the trigger. Also: cytech_update.sh now restarts HA when packages/cytech.yaml actually changes (needed for this fix, and any future one, to actually take effect -- previously only lovelace dashboard changes triggered an auto-restart).
warnings: HA will restart automatically after this update to load the new shell_command definition.
